--pos:
✨✨Specify the location of the terminal in the format "x,y"
(The upper left corner of the screen is the origin: x is 0, y is 0)
e.g. --pos 100,200   ---  Start at x 100, y 200.
--size: ✨✨Specify the number of columns and rows for the terminal in the format "column,row"
e.g. --size 80,25   --- Start with 80 columns and 25 rows
-w:
✨✨Specify the terminal window for running the given command line
e.g. -w 0   --- Run in the current window
     -w 1   --- Run in the next window
-h: Print this help message and exit

wt_core_info.p:
✨-p <profile>
Start the terminal with the specified configuration file
e.g. -p "Window PowerShell" --- Start with Window PowerShell
wt_core_info.d:
-d <start_dir>
Specify the startup directory
例如: -d "D:\"  ---  Start from D drive
wt_core_info.sp:
split-pane
Create a new split pane
